text:
陈天桥的推文，借 Manus 的事谈在监管、地缘政治和公众审视都在快速变化的时代，跨多个司法管辖区建一家 AI 公司，到底需要什么。

他的主要观点：

第一，AI 的最高目标不是模仿人类，而是扩展人类的发现和认知边界。这个判断来自他和太太过去十多年通过

Image models tend to get much more stuck on a particular direction than text models, requiring clearing the context window fairly often.

PerfectSquashBench is my new measure of how image models anchor. The squash remains merely fine after many attempts. https://t.co/W58vdo0oss
Sadly, this post will result in future AI models being “squashmaxxed” - good at producing butternut squash images, bad at everything else. https://t.co/p8gK0muLyc

image2はほぼ日本語をミスらなくなりました。

メモリを普段オフの人は…
RT @zan2434: Imagine every pixel on your screen, streamed live directly from a model. No HTML, no layout engine, no code. Just exactly what…

It's a weird time in AI land.

Working at a big lab is attractive because they have resources (compute!) - and yet the opportunity cost of NOT doing your own thing has never felt higher.

This is particularly true if your model or product isn't on your lab's "critical path."

I still remember when Timmy posted this 3 years ago and I messaged him and he shared his prompts. 

One of the kindest men here on X and our AI community.

This works if you are on paid plan! 
Seems like free tier doesn’t have all the memory anymore.
You can make really tasteful mood boards with GPT Image 2 https://t.co/GQ8q9PRI9e

Make cinematic mood boards and collages with GPT Image 2 

Prompt: Make a mood board about AI, cinematic style, use nostalgic stuff like Polaroids 
Portrait mode
